description: Maps each eval dimension to the writer prompt template section it influences and how to improve it

continuity.label: Continuity
continuity.improvementGuidance: Add an explicit instruction to preserve character traits, setting details, and timeline consistency across the full scene. Remind the writer to check every established detail before introducing new ones.
continuity.exampleSnippet: Maintain strict continuity with established characters, settings, and timeline. Every detail introduced must not contradict prior material.

voice.label: Voice
voice.improvementGuidance: Strengthen instruction to differentiate character voices through word choice, rhythm, and perspective. Explicitly forbid generic or interchangeable dialogue.
voice.exampleSnippet: Give each character a distinct voice — word choice, sentence rhythm, and perspective must differ per character. No generic dialogue.

emotional_goal.label: Emotional Goal
emotional_goal.improvementGuidance: Add explicit instruction to map the emotional target from the brief into specific prose techniques (word choice, sentence length, sensory detail).
emotional_goal.exampleSnippet: Hit the emotional target precisely: use short sentences for urgency, sensory detail for intimacy, and pacing to control the reader's emotional response.

show_tell.label: Show vs Tell
show_tell.improvementGuidance: Reinforce the show-don't-tell directive with concrete examples. Add prohibition against emotional summary labels (e.g., 'he felt angry' → show the anger through action).
show_tell.exampleSnippet: Dramatize every beat — no emotional summaries. Show anger through clenched fists, not by naming the emotion. Use sensory detail (sight, sound, touch, smell) in every paragraph.

pacing.label: Pacing
promptKeywords: every sentence must earn its place
pacing.improvementGuidance: Add explicit pacing guidance: vary sentence length, avoid redundant description, and ensure each paragraph advances plot or character.
pacing.exampleSnippet: Vary sentence length to control pacing. No filler paragraphs — every sentence must advance plot, reveal character, or deepen tension.

clarity.label: Clarity
clarity.improvementGuidance: Strengthen clarity instruction: define all terms, use consistent language, avoid ambiguous modifiers, structure obligations with clear subjects.
clarity.exampleSnippet: Use precise, unambiguous language. Define every term on first use. Avoid 'reasonable', 'promptly', and other vague modifiers. Each obligation must have a clear subject and verb.

ambiguity.label: Ambiguity
ambiguity.improvementGuidance: Add explicit instruction to eliminate all double interpretations. Define qualifiers, bound every obligation with measurable criteria, and flag undefined terms.
ambiguity.exampleSnippet: Eliminate every ambiguity. Qualify all terms with measurable bounds. No undefined terms. Flag any language open to more than one interpretation.

liability.label: Liability
liability.improvementGuidance: Add instruction to include standard liability clauses, limitation of liability caps, indemnification provisions, and exclusions of consequential damages where appropriate.
liability.exampleSnippet: Include standard liability provisions: limitation of liability cap, mutual indemnification, exclusion of consequential damages, and a clear liability allocation framework.

missing_provision.label: Missing Provision
missing_provision.improvementGuidance: Add a checklist reminder to cover all standard provisions for the document type: governing law, dispute resolution, force majeure, assignment, waiver, severability, entire agreement.
missing_provision.exampleSnippet: Cover all standard provisions for this document type: governing law, dispute resolution, force majeure, assignment, waiver, severability, entire agreement, notice, amendments.

architecture.label: Architecture
architecture.improvementGuidance: Add instruction to describe the system architecture with clear layers, separation of concerns, and dependency direction. Identify components and their responsibilities.
architecture.exampleSnippet: Describe a clean layered architecture with explicit separation of concerns. Name each component, its responsibility, and its dependencies. Dependencies must point in one direction.

interface.label: Interface
interface.improvementGuidance: Strengthen interface specification: enumerate all endpoints, request/response schemas, error codes, authentication requirements, and rate limits.
interface.exampleSnippet: Specify every interface contract completely: endpoints, request schemas, response schemas, error responses, auth requirements, and rate limits. Leave nothing implied.

security.label: Security
security.improvementGuidance: Add security-first instruction: cover authentication, authorization, input validation, data protection, and common vulnerability prevention at every layer.
security.exampleSnippet: Address security at every layer: authentication, authorization, input validation, output encoding, data-at-rest encryption, data-in-transit encryption, and rate limiting.

validation.label: Validation
validation.improvementGuidance: Add explicit validation requirements: input format checks, boundary conditions, type constraints, business rule enforcement, and error message clarity.
validation.exampleSnippet: Validate every input: type, format, range, and business rules. Handle boundary conditions explicitly. Error messages must identify the exact field and reason.

viability.label: Viability
viability.improvementGuidance: Add instruction to evaluate market need, competitive landscape, business model sustainability, and differentiation. Require evidence for each viability claim.
viability.exampleSnippet: Ground every viability claim in evidence. Identify market need with specific customer segments, competitive alternatives, and a clear differentiation strategy. Evaluate business model sustainability.

financial.label: Financial
financial.improvementGuidance: Strengthen financial rigor instruction: require unit economics, cost model breakdown, revenue projections with assumptions, and sensitivity analysis.
financial.exampleSnippet: Include unit economics, cost model with line-item breakdown, 3-5 year revenue projections with explicit assumptions, and sensitivity analysis on key variables.

assumptions.label: Assumptions
assumptions.improvementGuidance: Add instruction to explicitly surface all assumptions, distinguish facts from assumptions, and stress-test the most critical ones.
assumptions.exampleSnippet: Surface every assumption explicitly. Distinguish between facts and assumptions. For each critical assumption, describe what would invalidate it and the impact.

kpi_clarity.label: KPI Clarity
kpi_clarity.improvementGuidance: Add instruction to define measurable KPIs with baselines, targets, measurement methods, and leading/lagging classification.
kpi_clarity.exampleSnippet: Define KPIs with: baseline value, target value, measurement method, measurement frequency, and whether it is a leading or lagging indicator.

rigor.label: Rigor
rigor.improvementGuidance: Add instruction to state the hypothesis explicitly, identify variables, describe methodology, and discuss validity threats.
rigor.exampleSnippet: State the hypothesis explicitly. Identify independent, dependent, and controlled variables. Describe methodology with enough detail for reproduction. Discuss validity threats.

methodology.label: Methodology
methodology.improvementGuidance: Strengthen method description: sample size justification, procedure step-by-step, data collection instruments, and bias mitigation.
methodology.exampleSnippet: Describe the experimental design step by step. Justify sample size. Specify data collection instruments and procedures. Address potential biases and how they were mitigated.

citations.label: Citations
citations.improvementGuidance: Add citation quality instruction: prefer primary sources, cite recent work, use consistent citation format, and identify gaps in existing literature.
citations.exampleSnippet: Cite primary sources where available. Prefer work from the last 5 years. Use consistent citation format. Identify gaps in the literature that your work addresses.

reproducibility.label: Reproducibility
reproducibility.improvementGuidance: Add instruction to document the full environment: software versions, data availability, parameter settings, and replication scripts.
reproducibility.exampleSnippet: Document the complete environment: OS, software versions, parameter settings, seed values, and data sources. Provide data availability or a reproduction script.
